name: pipeline
description: Structured, multi-agent development: work packages run through design → critique → build → review → retro → ship, with separated planner/reviewer/builder personas, quality gates, and a compounding feedback loop that turns repeated observations into process fixes.

interface.shortDescription: Run work packages through planning, critique, build, review, retro, and ship.
interface.longDescription: Pipeline packages a structured multi-agent software delivery workflow for Codex. It provides skills for work planning, refinement, design, architecture, TDD implementation, review, documentation, retro, and shipping, with explicit planner/reviewer/builder separation.
defaultPrompt: Review this change with the pipeline.
Plan a new pipeline work package.
